description: arXiv:2607.20638v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in code generation and reasoning, yet their ability to perform temporal reasoning over digital waveform data remains largely unexplored. Although reasoning over digital waveforms is a critical bottleneck in design verification, existing benchmarks primarily evaluate hardware descri...
author: Yichuan Liu, Daniel Cummings, Nick Vadlamudi
